case_title: JUAN CARLOS SANTILLI VS. HEWLETT PACKARD COMPANY

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SANTILLI, JUAN CARLOS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HEWLETT PACKARD COMPANY $550.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $550.00, IN EXCHANGE FOR RETURN OF COMPUTER, NO OTHER COSTS TO BE ADDED, PER TERMS OF EARLIER MEDIATED SETTLEMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT HEWLETT PACKARD COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-11-2008 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-30-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY SANTILLI, JUAN CARLOS AS TO DEFENDANT HEWLETT PACKARD COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-11-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF SANTILLI, JUAN CARLOS
